Package com.bfo.json

Class JsonStream.Event

java.lang.Object
com.bfo.json.JsonStream.Event
Enclosing interface:
JsonStream
public static final class JsonStream.Event extends Object
The Events that are processed by a JsonStream

    booleanValue()
    Return the value for TYPE_PRIMITIVE events representing booleans, otherwise null

    Get an TYPE_BUFFER_DATA event with the specified .

    Get an TYPE_BUFFER_DATA event with the specified ReadableByteChannel.

    Return the value for TYPE_BUFFER_DATA events created with a ByteBuffer, otherwise null

    Get an TYPE_BUFFER_END event

    Get an TYPE_LIST_END event
    static JsonStream.Event
    endMap()
    Get an TYPE_MAP_END event
    static JsonStream.Event
    endString()
    Get an TYPE_STRING_END event
    boolean
    isNull()
    Return true for TYPE_PRIMITIVE events with a null value, otherwise false
    boolean
    isUndefined()
    Return true for TYPE_PRIMITIVE events with an undefined value, otherwise false
    static JsonStream.Event
    nullValue()
    Get an TYPE_PRIMITIVE event with a null value
    Number
    numberValue()
    Return the value for TYPE_PRIMITIVE events representing numbers or TYPE_SIMPLE, otherwise null
    static JsonStream.Event
    numberValue(Number number)
    Get an TYPE_PRIMITIVE event with the specified number value
    ReadableByteChannel
    readableByteChannelValue()
    Return the value for TYPE_BUFFER_DATA events created with a ReadableByteChannel, otherwise null
    Readable
    readableValue()
    Return the value for TYPE_PRIMITIVE or TYPE_STRING_DATA events created with a CharSequence, otherwise null
    static JsonStream.Event
    simple(int value)
    Get a TYPE_SIMPLE event with the specified value.
    long
    size()
    Return the size specified in the event, or 0 if the event has no size
    static JsonStream.Event
    startBuffer(long size)
    Create a new TYPE_BUFFER_START event
    static JsonStream.Event
    startList(int size)
    Create a new TYPE_MAP_START event

    startMap(int size)
    Create a new TYPE_MAP_START event
    static JsonStream.Event
    startString(long sizeInBytes)
    Create a new TYPE_STRING_START event
    static JsonStream.Event
    stringData(CharSequence data)
    Get an TYPE_STRING_DATA event with the specified CharSequence.
    static JsonStream.Event
    stringData(Readable data)
    Get an TYPE_STRING_DATA event with the specified Readable Zero or more events of this type are issued between startString(long) and endString() events Note the parameter is not copied and the underlying array may be reused, so the event should be processed immediately.
    CharSequence
    stringValue()
    Return the value for TYPE_PRIMITIVE or TYPE_STRING_DATA events created with a CharSequence, otherwise null
    static JsonStream.Event
    stringValue(CharSequence seq, int sizeInBytes)
    Get an TYPE_PRIMITIVE event with the specified string value.
    static JsonStream.Event
    tagNext(long tag)
    Specify a tag to apply to to the next map, list, string, buffer or primitive value

    For TYPE_TAG events, return the tag value, or 0 for other events

  • Method Details

    • startMap

      public static JsonStream.Event startMap(int size)
      Create a new TYPE_MAP_START event
      Parameters:
      size - the number of [key,value] pairs in the map, or -1 if unknown

    • startList

      public static JsonStream.Event startList(int size)
      Create a new TYPE_MAP_START event
      Parameters:
      size - the number of objects in the list, or -1 if unknown

    • startString

      public static JsonStream.Event startString(long sizeInBytes)
      Create a new TYPE_STRING_START event
      Parameters:
      sizeInBytes - the size of the String in bytes, or a value of -1 for indefinite

    • startBuffer

      public static JsonStream.Event startBuffer(long size)
      Create a new TYPE_BUFFER_START event
      Parameters:
      size - the size of the Buffer in bytes, or a value of -1 for indefinite

    • endMap

      public static JsonStream.Event endMap()
      Get an TYPE_MAP_END event

    • endList

      public static JsonStream.Event endList()
      Get an TYPE_LIST_END event

    • endString

      public static JsonStream.Event endString()
      Get an TYPE_STRING_END event

    • endBuffer

      public static JsonStream.Event endBuffer()
      Get an TYPE_BUFFER_END event

    • booleanValue

      public static JsonStream.Event booleanValue(boolean b)
      Get an TYPE_PRIMITIVE event with the specified boolean value

    • nullValue

      public static JsonStream.Event nullValue()
      Get an TYPE_PRIMITIVE event with a null value

    • undefinedValue

      public static JsonStream.Event undefinedValue()
      Get an TYPE_PRIMITIVE event with an "undefined" value

    • numberValue

      public static JsonStream.Event numberValue(Number number)
      Get an TYPE_PRIMITIVE event with the specified number value

    • stringValue

      public static JsonStream.Event stringValue(CharSequence seq, int sizeInBytes)
      Get an TYPE_PRIMITIVE event with the specified string value. This can be used as an alternative to startString(long), stringData(java.lang.CharSequence) and endString() events for simple Strings. Note the parameter is not copied and the underlying array may be reused, so the event should be processed immediately or copy() called.
      Parameters:
      seq - the sequence
      sizeInBytes - the UTF-8 byte length of the CharSequence if known, or -1 if undefined

    • stringData

      public static JsonStream.Event stringData(CharSequence data)
      Get an TYPE_STRING_DATA event with the specified CharSequence. Zero or more events of this type are issued between startString(long) and endString() events Note the parameter is not copied and the underlying array may be reused, so the event should be processed immediately or copy() called.
      Parameters:
      data - the character data

    • stringData

      public static JsonStream.Event stringData(Readable data)
      Get an TYPE_STRING_DATA event with the specified Readable Zero or more events of this type are issued between startString(long) and endString() events Note the parameter is not copied and the underlying array may be reused, so the event should be processed immediately.
      Parameters:
      data - the character data stream

    • bufferData

      public static JsonStream.Event bufferData(ByteBuffer data)
      Get an TYPE_BUFFER_DATA event with the specified . Zero or more events of this type are issued between startBuffer(long) and endBuffer() events Note the parameter is not copied and the underlying array may be reused, so the event should be processed immediately or copy() called.
      Parameters:
      data - the byte data

    • bufferData

      public static JsonStream.Event bufferData(ReadableByteChannel data)
      Get an TYPE_BUFFER_DATA event with the specified ReadableByteChannel. Zero or more events of this type are issued between startBuffer(long) and endBuffer() events Note the parameter is not copied and the underlying array may be reused, so the event should be processed immediately.
      Parameters:
      data - the byte data stream

    • tagNext

      public static JsonStream.Event tagNext(long tag)
      Specify a tag to apply to to the next map, list, string, buffer or primitive value
      Parameters:
      tag - the tag number, which must be positive

    • simple

      public static JsonStream.Event simple(int value)
      Get a TYPE_SIMPLE event with the specified value. "simple" datatypes are named after the term in CBOR, but these have no corresponding concept Json.
      Parameters:
      tag - the value

    • type

      public int type()
      Return the type, eg TYPE_MAP_END

    • size

      public long size()
      Return the size specified in the event, or 0 if the event has no size

    • tagValue

      public long tagValue()
      For TYPE_TAG events, return the tag value, or 0 for other events

    • isNull

      public boolean isNull()
      Return true for TYPE_PRIMITIVE events with a null value, otherwise false

    • isUndefined

      public boolean isUndefined()
      Return true for TYPE_PRIMITIVE events with an undefined value, otherwise false

    • booleanValue

      public Boolean booleanValue()
      Return the value for TYPE_PRIMITIVE events representing booleans, otherwise null

    • numberValue

      public Number numberValue()
      Return the value for TYPE_PRIMITIVE events representing numbers or TYPE_SIMPLE, otherwise null

    • stringValue

      public CharSequence stringValue()
      Return the value for TYPE_PRIMITIVE or TYPE_STRING_DATA events created with a CharSequence, otherwise null

    • readableValue

      public Readable readableValue()
      Return the value for TYPE_PRIMITIVE or TYPE_STRING_DATA events created with a CharSequence, otherwise null

    • bufferValue

      public ByteBuffer bufferValue()
      Return the value for TYPE_BUFFER_DATA events created with a ByteBuffer, otherwise null

    • readableByteChannelValue

      public ReadableByteChannel readableByteChannelValue()
      Return the value for TYPE_BUFFER_DATA events created with a ReadableByteChannel, otherwise null

    • value

      public Object value()
      Return the value for TYPE_PRIMITIVE events

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
